# Pull Request

## What does this PR do?
A clear, concise description of the change.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (changes existing behavior or API)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Test improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project style (PEP 8, NumPy-style docstrings)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the new behavior
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/` and `pytest tests/ -m slow`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under the appropriate section
- [ ] If the change affects numerical results, before/after comparison
      documented in the PR description
- [ ] If the change affects user-facing strings (CLI, REPORT, Excel),
      both the German and English editions are updated consistently

## Related issues
Fixes #___ / Related to #___

## Notes for reviewer
Anything specific the reviewer should focus on?
